title: Regarding Calendar
content:
![S-Planner & Google Calendar](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2013/01/calendars.jpg)

For calendar, I never realized that I will like Samsung's S-Planner. I like it because it displays list of appointments in month view. [Google Calendar](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.calendar), despite its simplicity, just shows color bars. I have to tap on the date in order to see the actual appointments. (Apple's Calendar.app does that too.)

I still use Mac OS X and iOS devices as regular companions so I use [BusyCal](http://www.busymac.com/busycal/) to sync between iCloud and Google Calendar.
